title: WIP: Record: Copy Network + Dict Residual (LZ77 + Brotli compression-inspired)
author: pinnerwt

data.description: Input token embeddings are tied with the output embedding/projection.
Uses fewer key/value heads than attention heads in the Transformer.
Pointer/copy mechanism attends over previous hidden states to copy repeated tokens from context.
Frozen n-gram dictionary provides base predictions that are mixed with neural correction logits.
Compression-inspired architecture combining LZ77-style backreferencing and Brotli-style dictionary prediction.

novel_contributions: Copy Network for parameter-constrained language modeling inspired by LZ77 backreferencing
Dictionary Residual using a frozen n-gram dictionary inspired by Brotli-style dictionary compression
Compression-theory-motivated architecture that separates repetitive, predictable, and semantic prediction roles
